content: WebRTC reconnection for game controllers: Connection states to handle: 'disconnected' (transient, may self-heal), 'failed' (requires ICE restart), 'closed' (requires full renegotiation). Mobile WebRTC drops more than desktop due to network handoff (WiFi→cellular). Best practice: monitor iceConnectionState, on 'failed' trigger ICE restart via restartIce(); implement exponential backoff for signaling reconnect; preserve session ID server-side so rejoining phone reclaims same player slot. Server must hold player slot for 30-60 seconds after disconnect before evicting. SDK must emit 'playerDisconnect' and 'playerReconnect' events rather than immediately removing player from game state. TURN fallback is automatic in ICE if configured; no special handling needed.
